description: Falsifiable enumeration of git ref classes the git-discipline protocol (DESIGN §11.1) references. A ref name is classified by first-match against ref_classes in order; anything not matching a pipeline-owned pattern falls through to the human default (default_owner). Both runtimes (agent-harness phase-loop-runtime and gp pipeline-runtime) read this registry so they agree on which prefixes are pipeline-owned and which refs self-heal may reconcile.

ref_classes.description: The pipeline-owned integration/working branch (one path segment version). Reconcile re-checks-out / rebases it; it is NEVER auto-deleted. Its tip is the projection pinned_commit for currency (§11.4).
The consiliency/pipeline/* family glob. Pipeline-owned; not auto-deleted (retained for provenance / rollback).
agent-harness per-phase isolated worktree branch, merged back --no-ff on disjoint ownership. An ALREADY-MERGED, leased instance may be pruned by self-heal (idempotent-safe).
gp pipeline-runtime per-phase worktree branch (buildWorktreeBranchRef). Record-only cleanup; an already-merged leased instance may be pruned by self-heal.

human_default.description: Everything not matching a pipeline-owned pattern (including the default branch and all human feature branches). NEVER auto-deleted or auto-moved by the pipeline; the NEVER-DELETE-HUMAN-REFS invariant governs.

self_heal_deletion_rule: A ref is eligible for self-heal deletion only if owner == 'pipeline' AND deletable_by_self_heal == true AND it is currently leased (and, for phase worktrees, already merged). All other refs — every human ref, every unleased pipeline ref, and every pipeline ref in a non-deletable class — are protected.
